form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 300m at this track beaten 7 lengths (17.95) behind Remission Run in a Grade 5 on April 11. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 300m at this track beaten 9 lengths (18.51) behind My Julia in a Grade 5 on April 15. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Returns from a four months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 300m at this track. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

formComments.comment: Returns from a four months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 300m at this track. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the hindquarters exiting the back straight and lost ground sharply.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 300m. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 525m at this track. Not among the main chances this time.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 8 length seventh over 300m at this track. Can't enthuse on this occasion.
